mnemonics: CIA: Continuous Internal Assessment. Just like a secret agent constantly evaluates a situation, your AI system should continuously assess its own performance internally.
keyPoints: It is an ongoing, automated process that runs alongside the AI's operation.
Its purpose is to proactively detect performance degradation, model drift, and emerging ethical issues.
It allows for rapid intervention and retraining before external users are negatively impacted.
commonMistakes: Confusing it with a one-off internal test or audit performed at a single point in time.
Assuming it replaces the need for external evaluation and real-world user feedback.
